enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mutta Bajji'?

The song 'Mutta Bajji' celebrates love and the joy of relationships, highlighting the playful side of romance.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Gethu'?

In Gethu, 'Mutta Bajji' is a lively number that showcases the characters' youthful spirit and their approach to love.

Who are the singers of 'Mutta Bajji'?

The song features an impressive lineup of singers including Anthonydasan, Ebisa, Gana Vinoth, and Marana Gana Viji.

Who composed the music for 'Mutta Bajji'?

The music for 'Mutta Bajji' was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his catchy and vibrant tunes.

When was 'Mutta Bajji' released?

'Mutta Bajji' was released on December 31, 2015, just in time for the New Year celebrations.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Gethu, 'Mutta Bajji' serves as a lively anthem that encapsulates the carefree spirit of youth and love. The song's upbeat tempo and playful lyrics evoke feelings of joy and celebration, making it a perfect fit for festive occasions. With a dynamic collaboration of talented singers, it conveys the excitement and thrill of romantic relationships. Overall, 'Mutta Bajji' is a delightful track that resonates with anyone who cherishes love and happiness.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mutta Bajji from Gethu is a vibrant celebration of love and joy, featuring an electrifying collaboration of talented singers like Anthonydasan, Ebisa, and Gana Vinoth. The infectious beats crafted by Harrish Jeyaraj will have you dancing along, making it the perfect anthem for any festive occasion. Dive into this energetic track that captures the essence of youthful exuberance and romance!
stanzaMeanings: Girls are now falling in love with the egg bajji.
When will you say that you love me?
Now, I have lost my way and am wandering around.
When will you say that you love me?
You are playful and mischievous, but you are also sweet.
Like a spinning top, you are going round and round.
My eyes are always on you, that's how I feel.
You are in my heart, that's how I feel about you.
I am saying that I love you, even if it seems like a big deal.
I am saying that I love you, even if it seems like a big deal.
I will make a panipuri and serve it to you.
Just like that, we both will enjoy together.
Like a soldier, you have taken my heart. If I lose you, my heart will break completely.
Banana, banana, banana, my dear, you are so sweet.
I came to the group and brought you along, but I am just a friend who treats you well.
I am saying that I love you, even if it seems like a big deal.

Love comes with a look that makes the eyes sparkle, and it brings a smile to the face.

If you leave, my heart will ache, and if you go away, I will miss you.
